title: arrhenatherum newtonii
intro: Arrhenatherum newtonii, also known as Newton's oat grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Arrhenatherum newtonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to address issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
